content.text: {"component":"tagging","summary":"Pre-RC, governed tagging-runtime with clear identity, runnable host-minimal, strong config/governance, and multi-band test tooling; finalize release and docs wiring to reach RC.","strengths":["Clear canonical tagging identity (composer description, README, docs)","Runnable host-minimal runtime with Docker and local server assets","Explicit HTTP contract surface and route/public-surface catalogs","Governance configs for RBAC, quotas, security, observability, webhooks","Multi-band testing/tooling present: PHPUnit, PHPStan, Panther, Playwright","GitHub Actions workflows present"],"risks":["No git tags found; release maturity not yet signaled","Antora report_path not present in repo tree; docs surfacing path may be mismatched","Test and static-analysis configs are .dist; CI execution/coverage not evidenced","E2E test tooling declared but CI wiring and outcomes not evidenced"],"next_actions":["Create a signed git tag and publish a release aligned to current CHANGELOG","Ensure phpunit, phpstan, and playwright jobs run in CI with published artifacts/status","Align Antora content with registry report_path or update registry to docs location","Connect this repository to the scheduled assessment runner to keep metrics fresh","Publish contract/docs artifacts via existing composer scripts in CI"],"notes":["Assessment grounded on master@cd92d3514dbe61d9fc316876501bd0b59bc52bbd (2026-04-08) with 566 files","Composer audit/test scripts were not executed in this run; findings based on repo
